title: Mechanical Engineer (BMS | PLC | Training Provided | Mechanical Engineering)
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd was founded in 2021, with a focused mission, providing our utmost support to individuals and organisations, to achieve their full potential. With a combined experience of more than 10 years, we thrive on providing our clients/candidates with the best and most sincere services. We believe not only in the business aspect of things, but able to help individuals & organisations on a personal level. Empowerment - To empower our team in making sound decisions, efficiently. Exceptional – We are dedicated to providing a holistic and an exceptional level of service to our clients. Ethical – To behave ethically, and to make moral decisions based on integrity. Accomplishment – We strive to accomplish all planned objectives and conquering set milestones. Accountable – We are accountable for our actions, decisions, and consequences. Assurance – We are committed to provide the best services to our clients We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.

Job Summary

Lead and manage maintenance operations by planning and supervising subcontractors and manpower to ensure optimal functioning of BMS/DCS/PLC/SCADA systems. Drive preventive maintenance scheduling, system troubleshooting, and technical guidance to support facility management and operational excellence.

Responsibilities

  • Plan and assign subcontractors and manpower for maintenance work and project handovers to ensure timely and efficient execution
  • Supervise and manage subcontractors to perform maintenance and servicing tasks in compliance with quality standards
  • Develop and schedule preventive maintenance plans to minimize system downtime and extend equipment lifespan
  • Perform routine system checks, backups, restorations, troubleshooting, and upgrades to maintain optimal performance of BMS/DCS/PLC/SCADA systems
  • Record servicing and maintenance data accurately and generate detailed service reports to track maintenance activities and outcomes
  • Provide technical and operational guidance and engineering solutions to maintenance site facility management teams to resolve issues and improve system reliability
  • Execute additional ad hoc duties as assigned to support maintenance and operational objectives

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent
  • Knowledge of BMS, PLC, and HVAC systems is advantageous
  • Training provided for candidates with less experience or without prior exposure to relevant systems

Other Information

  • Working location: West / On-site
  • Working Days: Monday to Friday
  • Working hours: 8.30am to 5.30pm
  • Basic salary: $3500 - $4200 + Allowance + Variable Bonus

LIONG ZHAO GUAN (R22107632)
EA Recruitment Pte Ltd
EA License No: 21C0492
